aboutUs.subText: MyTour is a travel platform that helps you plan your next journey by allowing you to find the best tours in one place, explore them, and book online.
alreadyRegisteredText: You are already registered with this phone number. Please login.
amountToBePaidErrorMessage: You cannot pay less than {{amount}} AMD and more than {{maxAmount}} AMD
availableSeatsTooltip: Extended hotel room access prior to departure for the airport
bookingRegisterText: For booking, you need to make a prepayment of {{paymentAmount}} AMD.
cancelUntil: We remind you that you can cancel your booking for free before {{date}}.
filterHotelNotFound: No hotels matching the specified criteria were found
filterPackageNotFound: No packages matching the specified criteria were found
flightSearchText: We are looking for available return dates, please wait.
forBookingYouNeed: To book, you need to make a prepayment of {{amount}} AMD.
halfPaymentDescription: In case of partial payment, the remaining amount may change at the time of payment due to fluctuations in the US dollar exchange rate. The calculation is based on the US dollar exchange rate set by the travel agency at the time of payment.
hotelPackagesNotFoundText: No available hotels were found for your selected criteria. Please adjust your search and try again
howManyDaysAreYouPlanning: How many days are you planning?
incorrectOTPErrorMessage: The OTP is incorrect, please try again
lateCheckoutFromHotelDescription: Hotel room will be available before departure to the airport
minPrePaymentText: Minimum prepayment: {{amount}} of the package price
minPrePaymentTextWithDetails: Partial payment is not available due to the booking dates.
myTourApp: MyTour is also available at MyAmeria app
name: Name
noAccountErrorMessage: There is no account with the specified phone number.
noDirection: New destinations are on the way
noMatchingPackage.few: No package with a duration of {{day}} was found.
noMatchingPackage.many: No package with a duration of {{day}} was found.
noMatchingPackage.one: No package with a duration of {{day}} was found.
noMatchingPackage.other: No package with a duration of {{day}} was found.
noPrepaymentText: Since your flight is more than {{days}} days away, you can make booking without prepayment.
noPrepaymentTextWithDetails: Since your flight is more than {{days}} days away, you can make booking without prepayment. The first payment of AMD {{amount}} must be made by {{dueDate}}.
noResult: We didn't find packages matching your parameters. Try searching with different parameters or write to us via live chat
noRoomsFoundWithParams: No rooms found with the specified parameters
otpEnterText: Enter the one-time password (OTP) that was sent to the phone number {{phoneNumber}}.
otpUserBlockedErrorMessage: You have exceeded the limit for requesting a one-time password. Please contact us at +374 33 32 00 50 for further details.
packageBanner.subtitle1.hotel: Book a hotel- save up to 40% compared to Booking.com
packageBanner.subtitle1.package: Book your next trip to Egypt with no prepayment for flights departing in 40 days or later.
packagesHeader.title: Start planning your vacation now
packagesHeader.subtitle: From air tickets to hotels, all bookings and payments in one place
packagesNotFoundText: We didn't find any packages matching your selected criteria. Please try searching with different criteria.
partialPaymentText: In case of partial payment, the remaining part of the amount may change at the time of payment due to fluctuations in the exchange rate of the US dollar. The calculation is based on the US dollar exchange rate set by the travel agency at the time of payment.
partialPaymentTextWithCurrency: In case of partial payment, the remaining part of the amount may change at the time of payment due to fluctuations in the exchange rate of the {{currency}}. The calculation is based on the {{currency}} exchange rate set by the travel agency at the time of payment.
payFullDescription: You will pay the full amount of {{amount}} AMD
paymentFailedErrorMessage: Payment failed. Please contact +374 33 32 00 50 for details.
bookingSuccessModalText: Thank you for your booking. Your request has been sent to the hotel for confirmation.
paymentSuccessModalText: Thank you, the payment has been successfully completed.
priceChangeText: The price is subject to change depending on the period when you make the final purchase
roomTravelersLimitExceeded: The number of travelers in the room cannot exceed {{maxTravelers}}
scanQRText: Please scan the QR code to proceed with payment.
subscribeCTA: Subscribe and be the first to know about our news
subscribeSlogan: We are working to offer you new destinations
successDescription: Thank you for booking. The request has been sent for hotel confirmation. You will receive booking confirmation by email
successfullyEdited: Editing completed. Review the offer before booking.
thankYouForBookingText: Thank you for your booking. The request has been sent for hotel confirmation.
upcomingRequestsEmptyText: You don't have any upcoming bookings
promoCodeInvalid: This promo code is invalid or has expired.
promoCodeExpired: This promo code is no longer available.
promoCodeMinimumValue: This promo requires a minimum order of {{Amount}} AMD.
promoCodeScopeMismatch: This promo code is not valid for the selected hotel or destination.
promoCodeNewUserOnly: This promo code is for new customers only.
promoCodeValidationFailed: Failed to validate promo code. Please try again.
whatIncludesInPackage: What is included in the package
whenAreYouPlanningToLeave: When do you plan to travel?
